answer:
~$0 federal. Shares acquired 2016 (post-9/27/2010) get 100% QSBS exclusion under §1202, cap = greater of $10M or 10x basis — $8M gain fits under $10M cap. Excluded gain also exempt from AMT & NIIT.

Caveats that could break this: shares must be original issuance (not bought secondhand), corp gross assets ≤$50M at issuance, active qualified trade/business (not finance, consulting, etc.), no disqualifying redemptions. 5-yr holding met (10 yrs). Confirm QSBS status w/ CPA + get company attestation before sale. State tax separate — e.g., CA doesn't conform, taxes full gain.
